description_long: This sculpture depicts a life-sized male figure dressed in a suit, standing upright on a rectangular plinth that is itself mounted on a large circular concrete base. The figure holds a rolled document in his left hand and has a formal, dignified posture, with his right hand resting at his side. The base features engraved text panels around its perimeter, likely providing information about the subject or commemorating an event. The surface of the sculpture shows weathering and patina, suggesting it is made of bronze or a similar metal. The circular base is smooth and slightly raised, with a metal plaque and a round embedded marker visible on its surface. The overall presentation is formal and commemorative, suitable for a public or civic space.
description: A life-sized bronze statue of a man in a suit stands on a circular concrete base with engraved text panels and plaques. The figure holds a rolled document and has a dignified, formal posture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the man's face, suit details, and the rolled document in his left hand, with the engraved base and plaques clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the figure, the rolled document, and the curvature of the circular base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the suit, the figure's stance, and the full circumference of the engraved base.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the figure's right arm at his side and the base's text panels, with the plaque and marker on the base more visible.
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is installed on a large, flat, circular base, suggesting an outdoor public space such as a plaza, park, or civic area.
